title: Le0s Spoons
description: This is a mod that makes it so you cannot eat any food unless you are holding a spoon.
body:
## This is a really old mod I made, so do not take it seriously! :)

This mod ultimately makes minecraft a harder game - It makes it so you cannot eat any food (Modded or not) without a spoon in your mainhand or your offhand. Spoons however do have a durability value that decreases when you use it. The spoon can also be enchanted with sword enchantments for a little extra fun.
